LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT 2555 LEAVENWORTH STREET APARTMENTS INC.'S DEMURRER. APPEARANCE FOR DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY; NO OTHER APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING - OVERRULED, AS TO THE 1ST AND 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION. SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION AS FOLLOWS LANGUAGE IN RE PERSONAL INJURY CLAIM IS SUFFICIENT, NEEDS TO ALLEGE FACTS SHOWING DISCOVERY OF PROPERTY DAMAGE CLAIM WITHIN 3 YEARS OF COMPLAINT. SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION AS FOLLOWS; LANGUAGE AS TO DEFENDANTS EXCEPT BOHAN IS SUFFICIENT RE CC&R'S, BUT NEED TO SHOW HOW DEFENDANT BOHAN CO. IS PARTY TO CC&R'S. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. HON. RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. REPORTER: BELDON YEE, CSR #2647

DEMURRER
Off Calendar Mar-26-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Keith Reyen, Esq., Oium & Reyen, 281-8888, for defendant and moving party 2555 Leavenworth Street Apartments, Inc.
No other appearances.
*No appearance plaintiff. The Court adopts its tentative ruling -- DEFENDANT 2555 LEAVENWORTH STREET APARTMENTS INC.'S DEMURRER -- is overruled, as to the 1st and 4th cause of action. Sustained with leave to amend as to 2nd cause of action as follows language in re personal injury claim is sufficient, needs to allege facts showing discovery of property damage claim within 3 years of complaint. Sustained with leave to amend as to 3rd cause of action as follows; language as to defendants except Bohan is sufficient re CC&R's, but need to show how defendant Bohan Co. is party to CC&R's. Order signed in open court. CSR Beldon Yee, #2647 (REQ/302/RS)
